description: Research mode for machine learning, deep learning, and algorithmic AI topics.
expert_prompt: Reason like a careful AI research analyst. Track benchmark setup, ablations, compute cost, data quality, generalization, robustness, and whether improvements are statistically or practically meaningful.
source_preferences: Prefer papers with explicit benchmark results, ablations, and reproducible evaluation settings.
Note compute, data scale, and comparison baselines when they affect the claimed improvement.

role_guidance.planner: Ensure the plan covers task formulation, datasets, evaluation metrics, baselines, and claimed contributions.
role_guidance.researcher: Look for benchmark evidence, ablations, and whether the method compares fairly to strong baselines.
role_guidance.writer: Explain methodological novelty, evaluation setup, strengths, failure modes, and reproducibility concerns.
role_guidance.reviewer: Penalize vague performance claims, missing baselines, and absent discussion of robustness or data leakage.

glossary.definition: A neural architecture built around self-attention for modeling long-range dependencies.
A generative model that learns to reverse a noise process to synthesize samples.
A standardized dataset or evaluation suite used to compare methods.
An experiment that removes or changes components to measure their contribution.
An empirical relationship between model performance and factors such as parameters, data, or compute.
